discord.Credential containing the Discord bot to: Credential containing the Discord bot token used for Gateway and REST calls.
discord.Discord application/client ID. Used to i: Discord application/client ID. Used to identify the bot and validate component interactions.
discord.Optional comma-separated Discord server: Optional comma-separated Discord server IDs. When set, guild messages from other servers are ignored.
discord.Allow users to talk to the bot in Discor: Allow users to talk to the bot in Discord DMs.
discord.Allow server messages that mention the b: Allow server messages that mention the bot to start or continue a Hexabot conversation.
discord.Disable Discord message buttons after a: Disable Discord message buttons after a user selects one, keeping link buttons enabled.
discord.Automatically start a new thread when th: Automatically start a new thread when the last message is older than this threshold.
